title: Elmas private spaceport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Elmas private spaceport''' was a spaceport on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] run by the government. A group of old-fashioned smugglers worked here, helping to maintain a low profile for the clientele. Both the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'' and the ''[[Love Commander]]'' docked there after the [[assassination attempt on Wedge Antilles]] as the members of those ships' crews were trying to avoid [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] attention. Both ships and the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] ended up blasting out of the spaceport once their cover had been blown.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
